title: sorghum ternatum
intro: Sorghum ternatum, also known as wild sorghum, is a perennial plant native to parts of Asia and Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to clear heat, detoxify, and relieve inflammation. The health benefits of Sorghum ternatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The herbal preparations of Sorghum ternatum typically involve drying the roots and leaves to make them into teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
